race.description: C.ex Community Crew Sleep Out C,G&E Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: This race has changed complete complexion after a stack of key outs. LORD SEYMOUR (8) dug deep to get off the mark fresh. Was less effective second-up but got things back on tack last start when chasing gamely into the placings in the slop at Coffs Harbour. Peaking now and keeps the 2kg claimer aboard. Looks the one to beat now. THE LUPERCAL (7) doesn't win out of turn but is knocking on the door and has good early toe. Expect him to push forward from the middle draw and give backers a sight. CARDSHARP (5) returns over a preferred trip and usually races well fresh. Draws well and gets an important claim. Should measure up. OLUFSEN (3) best of the rest.

favourite.owners: Mrs E J Murden & Ms S J Morsley
